title: A list of our users
author: agriyakhetarpal
body:
We've reached storage limits on PyPI, and I've had to delete wheels for older versions for some time now. I would like to request an increase in the size limit, and I will open a support request for it at some point. In the meantime, here are my notes to help myself with that request. They include information on how many users I have for the package, primarily gathered from Sourcegraph and GitHub search results using various combinations.

| User/repo/source | Notes |
|--------|--------|
| https://github.com/django/birthday20 | https://github.com/django/birthday20/blob/4309d59bf4f9615bccb5c78c68eb3684499fff9a/uv.lock#L10 |
| https://github.com/ckorikov/archive/ | https://github.com/ckorikov/archive/blob/master/tools/pyproject.toml |
| https://github.com/fundor333/fundor333.github.io/ | https://github.com/fundor333/fundor333.github.io/blob/7906e8b77a6e90819ae214471c25734e16068497/uv.lock#L491|
| https://github.com/soda92/hugo-nbconvert/ | https://github.com/soda92/hugo-nbconvert/blob/720d5c9cc07ac8358aeacdfd1bd1a17ea35211b7/pyproject.toml#L8 |
| https://github.com/fundor333/irenemazzo.it/ | https://github.com/fundor333/irenemazzo.it/blob/9813f305a95eddc7a688d9249bb37e56c945f7ee/uv.lock#L351 (pulled in as a transitive dependency) |
| https://github.com/soda92/surun/ | https://github.com/soda92/surun/blob/7537ac94879079ea55e56d9ff0540f457febf740/uv.lock#L470 (pulled in as a transitive dependency) |
| https://github.com/wunewww/wunewww.github.io/ | https://github.com/wunewww/wunewww.github.io/blob/68e593aea41c91e87c0e2e7d4cd71de050ace146/pyproject.toml#L8 |
| https://github.com/mikedecr/website/ | https://github.com/mikedecr/website/blob/91aa7904952e798734654386813b6c8c5e2f5efc/pyproject.toml#L8 (they need to update it though!) |
| https://github.com/alexeev-prog/pyminideprecator/ | https://github.com/alexeev-prog/pyminideprecator/blob/292da48046b001fbb561bf574e1dd497f68c804e/pyproject.toml#L88 |
| https://github.com/ulgens/ulgenwanders.net/ | https://github.com/ulgens/ulgenwanders.net/blob/e5703559b6145ec5047ff61c5a0886f8149ad03a/pyproject.toml#L11 |
| https://github.com/KeironO/blog | https://github.com/KeironO/blog/blob/199ecd7823d78a4b47a2a48dd71067a9e27172c0/pyproject.toml#L8 and https://github.com/KeironO/blog/pull/7 |
| https://github.com/chris-kremer/SocPref_termpaper/ | https://github.com/chris-kremer/SocPref_termpaper/blob/f814142a2a8f83a3bd26c2939fe509201bbf58e1/requirements.txt#L54 |
| https://github.com/simo-hue/LLM-Tourism-Mobility-Predictor-HPC-A100/ | https://github.com/simo-hue/LLM-Tourism-Mobility-Predictor-HPC-A100/blob/72e5b28f334ca895dc7c77ae37d218381c4bc25c/requirements.txt#L65 |
| https://github.com/JarrahDev/Markup-Forge | https://github.com/JarrahDev/Markup-Forge/blob/e669f2211309fe2ee3b44cf22cc0575cc9708104/server_code/requirements.txt#L2 |
| https://github.com/steffiland/mkdocs-blog | https://github.com/steffiland/mkdocs-blog/blob/49d591d201d42b10251f69e5ab5b812002cb282c/requirements.txt#L1 |

| https://github.com/Conclusion-Xforce/conclusionxforce.cloud | https://github.com/Conclusion-Xforce/conclusionxforce.cloud/blob/d56abfb1031dd8fa8cde84b5bc93de10d336558e/requirements.txt#L1 |
| https://github.com/OliverVea/OliverVea.github.io | https://github.com/OliverVea/OliverVea.github.io/blob/c56253183c79115eb6ae501bb1e15db713cc76a1/requirements.txt#L1 (they need to update it though!) |
| https://github.com/brenthuisman/par2cmdline-turbo.py | Not a user, but I was able to help them, which is nice :) |
| https://github.com/shotakaha/kumaroot | They use the package and react to releases often |
